Title: Enacts Alexa and Lindsey's law
Summary: Enacts Alexa and Lindsey's law; prohibits disabling safety features in motor vehicles; provides enhanced penalties where it causes an accident that harms or kills another person; provides that if multiple people are harmed or killed as a result of an unsafe vehicle modification a consecutive sentence may be imposed.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the vehicle and traffic law and the penal law, in relation to prohibiting unsafe vehicle modifications and providing enhanced sentencing guidelines where an accident harms or kills someone as a result of the unsafe vehicle modification
